calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 12, 2005 was admitted to probate.

Marnfa Sember was appointed as Executor with full IAEA authority. Bond was not required.

Amy Harrington was appointed probate referee.

The Court set a status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration for October 5, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed at least two weeks prior to the status date, no appearance is required.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
